arts.ttl: Chris Sutton salutes superb Reo Hatate as he shares the change he's noticed in him at Celtic
arts.sum: Chris Sutton salutes Celtic star Reo Hatate amid Leipzig display He explained: “Four Champions League games so far and Hatate has started in three of them.

arts.sum: The 24-year-old failed to hit the heights in Glasgow but they are going nuts for him in Brazil

arts.ttl: Bernabei 'proving a sensation' away from Celtic and even touted for wrong country
arts.sum: Alexandro Bernabei provided an assist during their recent 2-0 win.

arts.sum: Celtic boss repeats wish to retain services of defender as English clubs circle teen talent.

arts.ttl: Kasper Schmeichel makes Celtic clean and clinical plea as keeper shuts down Leicester Champions League repeat talk
arts.sum: The experienced keeper says there's no chance anyone at Celtic Park will get carried away with Tuesday's Champions League victory over RB Leipzig.

arts.ttl: Reo Hatate is an outrageous Celtic talent but there's something else I've noticed about star man – Chris Sutton
arts.sum: The Parkhead hero pays tribute to the fan favourite who was front and centre and dominating games at Europe’s highest level.

arts.ttl: 7 Celtic presser headlines: New contracts, silencing critics and injury updates
arts.sum: I always say, if you press well, you pass well and I think that's been the best game, a demonstration of that on Tuesday night. They are coming off of a tremendous Champions League victory against RB Leipzig and will be looking to maintain their lead at the top of the Scottish Premiership heading into the international break.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers waxes lyrical over unsung Celtic star who he wants to work with 'for as long as I possibly can'
arts.sum: But I really hope it doesn't get to that because I love working with Greg Taylor. Brendan Rodgers admits he wants Greg Taylor to thrash out his Celtic future sooner rather than later.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers addresses Alistair Johnston and Greg Taylor's contract latest at Celtic
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers has addressed Alistair Johnston and Greg Taylor’s contract situations at Celtic as both continue to play a pivotal role in his side’s success. “Nothing to add, he’s clearly a player we’d want to tie down and he’s an absolutely fantastic guy to work with on and off the pitch.

arts.ttl: Greg Taylor new Celtic contract stance made clear by Brendan Rodgers as boss issues 'plan and prepare' warning
arts.sum: The Hoops full-back is heading into the final months of his current agreement at Parkhead
